<sigh> ...When we said our farewells to Arenvald, I was afraid that something like this might happen, but now that it has...

Yes, I'll try asking him.

104:
Amidst all the fighting, it's easy to forget what we've achieved, isn't it? I mean...we cured Tiamat. <Emphasis>Tiamat</Emphasis>, for heavens' sake!
...You <Emphasis>will</Emphasis> tell me if I become insufferably smug, won't you? Because the way things are going, it feels like a definite possibility.
